custom_css: @media (min-width: 990px){/* use the header itself as the grid */ .header--middle-left{display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr; align-items: center; } .header--middle-left .header__heading{grid-column:1; justify-self:start; } .header--middle-left .header__inline-menu{grid-column:2; justify-self:center; width:auto; } .header--middle-left .header__icons{grid-column:3; justify-self:end; position: static; } .header--middle-left .list-menu--inline{justify-content:center; }}
